case_title: LATANYA SPEARS VS. RENT-A- CENTER, INC

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY RENT-A- CENTER, INC IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $30.00 AS COSTS ASSOCIATED WITH PREVIOUS APPEARANCES. THE PARTIES STIPULATED TO HAVE THE MATTER HEARD ON THE MERITS.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPEARS, LATANYA AS TO DEFENDANT RENT-A- CENTER, INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPEARS, LATANYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RENT-A- CENTER, INC $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RENT-A- CENTER, INC
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR JUDGMENT HEARING SET FOR FEB-21-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2008 - JUDGMENT. THE COURT FINDS THE FAIR MARKET VALUE OF THE DAMAGES AS FOLLOWS: TELEVISION $450; COUCH & LOVE SEAT $400; COFFEE TABLE $243.10. DINING ROOM TABLE & CHAIR $500; COATS & SHOES $100. MOTION TO VACATE IS GRANTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SPEARS, LATANYA AS TO DEFENDANT RENT-A- CENTER, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-24-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-24-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-24-2007 BY JPT MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: F. RAYRAY. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-06-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RENT-A- CENTER, INC
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RENT-A- CENTER, INC HEARING SET FOR FEB-21-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB 21, 2008. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK;S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPEARS, LATANYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RENT-A- CENTER, INC $1,723.10 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,808.10, THE COURT FINDS THE FAIR MARKET VALUE OF THE DAMAGED ITEMS AS FOLLOWS: TELEVISION $450; COUCH & LOVE SEAT $400; COFFEE TABLE $243.10; DINNING ROOM TABLE & CHAIRS $500. COATS & SHOES $100. MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $30 AS COSTS ASSOCIATED WITH PREVIOUS APPEARANCE. THE PARTIES STIPULATED TO HAVE THE MATTER HEARD ON THE MERITTS. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FOR BOTH SIDES RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER. : CLERK: F. RAYARY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RENT-A- CENTER, INC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
